mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is falling over recent months, discount rates and financing stress ease, so equity multiples expand and the S&P 500 posts positive 20-day forward returns.
failure_condition: Reject if falling FEDFUNDS periods do not outperform flat or rising FEDFUNDS periods on 20-day returns, or if the signal's rank IC stays below 0.03 in any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE above a short-run threshold signals deteriorating household income and future demand weakness, which compresses equity earnings expectations and drives negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE threshold breaks are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more than 60% of the time, or if the conditional hit rate is indistinguishable from unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: A joint slowdown in RSAFS and HOUST indicates weakening consumer spending and housing demand together, which lowers revenue expectations and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous declines in RSAFS and HOUST do not outperform single-series declines in predicting negative 60-day returns, or if the combined signal's rolling IC falls below 0.03 for any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO rises while payroll growth remains firm, the economy is absorbing demand without broad output collapse, supporting earnings momentum and positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if combined improvements in INDPRO and PAYEMS fail to produce positive 20-day returns more often than baseline, or if the interaction term adds no predictive power versus either series alone.

mechanism_narrative: If CPIAUCSL accelerates while FEDFUNDS remains below inflation, real policy rates stay negative and the market anticipates tighter policy, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation trend turns up for 2 consecutive months and FEDFUNDS < CPIAUCSL inflation trend
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-up / policy-behind episodes do not precede negative 20-day returns more than 55% of the time, or if the signal reverses sign when inflation accelerates.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in GDPC1 after prior growth signals an economy slipping into contraction, which lowers forward earnings estimates and causes negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 annualized growth is negative in the latest quarter
failure_condition: Reject if quarters with negative GDPC1 growth do not coincide with below-baseline 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if the signal's directional accuracy falls below 55% in rolling out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS grows while UNRATE falls, labor conditions are improving and income risk is easing, so equity breadth and earnings expectations strengthen and the S&P 500 rises over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous payroll gains and unemployment declines fail to produce positive 5-day returns more often than not, or if the joint signal is weaker than PAYEMS alone.

mechanism_narrative: A housing downturn signaled by declining HOUST leads consumer confidence and credit-sensitive spending lower, which depresses S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below its prior 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if below-average HOUST readings are not followed by weaker 60-day S&P 500 returns than baseline, or if the signal loses significance after accounting for the last 3 years of data.
